title: Quick-Fix Ethiopian Teff Stir-fry
description: A fresh, dense, quick-fix Ethiopian dish featuring muscovado sugar and sautéed in a Mediterranean-friendly way.

ingredients.name: 1 onion, chopped
ingredients.notes: All parts used for extra flavor.

ingredients.name: 1 bell pepper, sliced
ingredients.notes: Red or green for a vibrant color and taste.

instructions: In a large bowl, mix teff flour with muscovado sugar and salt.
Add chopped garlic and onion, mixing well.
Gradually pour in olive oil while continuously stirring to avoid lumps. Mix until smooth and creamy.
Sauté bell peppers in another pan over medium heat for about 5 minutes or until softened slightly.
Gradually stir the teff mixture into the sautéed vegetables, continuing to stir until a thick and uniform consistency is achieved.
Serve hot with fresh cilantro leaves on top as garnish.
